'''''Star Wars: The Official Magazine'' 4''' was the 4th issue of the ''[[Star Wars: The Official Magazine]]'', covering [[October]] and [[November]] [[1996]] and containing 66 pages.

==Contents==
===Departments===
*[[Feel the Force]]
*Q&A
*[[Jawa's Corner|Jawas' Corner]]
*[[Second Trooper]]: [[Michael Sheard]]
*:<small>[[Michael Sheard]] recalls his roles as [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Kendal Ozzel/Legends|Ozzel]] and [[Wikipedia:Adolf Hitler|Hitler]] for Star Wars and [[Wikipedia:Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade|Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade]].</small>
*[[Comlink (department)|Comlink]]

===Features===
*"[[Return of the Radio Drama]]" {{C|from [[Star Wars Insider 30|''Star Wars Insider'' 30]]}}
*Exclusive Interview: [[Mark Hamill]]
*:<small>20 years on, Mark Hamill has progressed from the world of Star Wars to multi-million pound computer games and writing comic books, as [[Eric Frederickson]] reveals.</small>
*''[[Boba Fett: Twin Engines of Destruction]]''
*:<small>Part One of Two. [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] is back by popular demand – but is he the genuine item?</small>
*[[The Making of Star Wars (feature)|The Making of ''Star Wars'']]
*:<small>How careful starship design proved just part of the lasting appeal of the Star Wars films…</small>
*"[[From Jedi to Jumanji: Joe Johnston Profile]]" {{C|from [[Star Wars Insider 28|''Star Wars Insider'' 28]]}}
